ddls:
CREATE TABLE "meditation_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency of meditation */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size for the frequency category */,
  "average_meditation_time" REAL /* Average time spent meditating per session for this frequency category */,
  "average_sessions_per_week" REAL /* Average number of meditation sessions per week for this frequency category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "religions" (
  "religion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each religion */,
  "religion_name" TEXT /* Name of the religion */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of individuals practicing meditation with this religion */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the religion */,
  "core_principles" TEXT /* Core principles of the religion related to meditation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("religion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "philosophies" (
  "philosophy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each philosophy */,
  "philosophy_name" TEXT /* Name of the philosophical reason */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of individuals motivated by this philosophy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the philosophy */,
  "influential_figures" TEXT /* Influential figures associated with the philosophy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("philosophy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "common_senses" (
  "common_sense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each common sense perception */,
  "perception" TEXT /* Description of the common sense perception */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of individuals with this perception */,
  "explanation" TEXT /* Explanation of the perception */,
  "scientific_basis" TEXT /* Scientific basis for the perception */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("common_sense_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sciences" (
  "science_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scientific evidence */,
  "scientific_evidence" TEXT /* Description of the scientific evidence */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of individuals aware of this scientific evidence */,
  "study_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the scientific study */,
  "research_institutions" TEXT /* Research institutions associated with the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("science_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "knowledge_levels" (
  "knowledge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each knowledge level */,
  "knowledge_level" TEXT /* Description of the knowledge level */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of individuals with this knowledge level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the knowledge level */,
  "resources" TEXT /* Recommended resources for increasing knowledge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("knowledge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the frequency of meditation */,
  "religion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the religion */,
  "philosophy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the philosophical reason */,
  "common_sense_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the common sense perception */,
  "science_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scientific evidence */,
  "knowledge_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the knowledge level */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "meditation_goals" TEXT /* Meditation goals of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_religion_id FOREIGN KEY ("religion_id") REFERENCES religions ("religion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_knowledge_id FOREIGN KEY ("knowledge_id") REFERENCES knowledge_levels ("knowledge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_science_id FOREIGN KEY ("science_id") REFERENCES sciences ("science_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES meditation_frequencies ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_common_sense_id FOREIGN KEY ("common_sense_id") REFERENCES common_senses ("common_sense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_philosophy_id FOREIGN KEY ("philosophy_id") REFERENCES philosophies ("philosophy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_meditation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meditation log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "meditation_date" TEXT /* Date of the meditation practice */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the meditation in minutes */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of meditation practiced */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the meditation session */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the meditation session (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_meditation_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the resource */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the resource */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (article, video, podcast, etc.) */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the resource (beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who posted */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the post was made */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the post (introduction, question, discussion, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who commented */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the comment (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES community_posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_resource_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource viewed */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was viewed */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the resource (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_resource_views_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_resource_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "user1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first user */,
  "user2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second user */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (friend, mentor, mentee) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_relationships_user1_id FOREIGN KEY ("user1_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_relationships_user2_id FOREIGN KEY ("user2_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* Name of the badge */,
  "badge_description" TEXT /* Description of the badge */,
  "earned_date" TEXT /* Date the badge was earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_badges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
